name: Bird Perch
tagline: Bird vocal ID — Kaggle TF classifier + k-NN ranks
description: Lightweight static audio UI and FastAPI backend. Loads google/bird-vocalization-classifier (TensorFlow 2) from Kaggle Models, runs nearest-species ranking from logits. Requires Kaggle credentials for first-time model download unless BIRDPERCH_MODEL_PATH points to an extracted model directory.

env_vars.description: Optional. Local path to an extracted Kaggle TF SavedModel (skips kagglehub download).
Set to 1 for development without TensorFlow model (returns mock species).
Kaggle API username (with KAGGLE_KEY) for kagglehub model download on first request.
Kaggle API key for model download.
